deregisterMerchant().details: Cannot deregister if there are pending refunds or disputes

returns.refundRate: Refund rate in basis points (refunds / total tx * 10000)

payInPerson(address,address,uint256,stri.details: Use for POS terminals, QR scans, face-to-face transactions

payOnline(address,address,uint256,string.details: Reverts - online payments require escrow via VFIDECommerce

acceptOwnership().notice: Complete ownership transfer (must be called by pending owner)

completeRefund(bytes32).notice: Complete a refund (transfer tokens back to customer)

getCustomerTrustScore(address).notice: Get customer's trust assessment (read-only for merchants)

getRefundsForCustomer(address).notice: Get all refund IDs for a customer

getRefundsForMerchant(address).notice: Get all refund IDs for a merchant

minSwapOutputBps().notice: Slippage protection for swaps (basis points, e.g., 9800 = 98% = 2% slippage)

pay(address,address,uint256,string).notice: Simplified payment: customer pays merchant directly (pulls from msg.sender's vault)

payInPerson(address,address,uint256,stri.notice: In-person payment - instant settlement, no escrow

payInvoice(address,address,uint256,strin.notice: Invoice payment - bill/invoice with channel tracking

payOnline(address,address,uint256,string.notice: Online payment - MUST use escrow for buyer protection

paySubscription(address,address,uint256,.notice: Subscription payment - recurring with channel tracking

processPayment(address,address,uint256,s.notice: Process a payment from customer to merchant

registerMerchant(string,string).notice: Register as a merchant (requires minimum ProofScore)

setAutoConvert(bool).notice: Enable or disable automatic conversion for stable-pay merchants

setPayoutAddress(address).notice: Set a custom payout address (e.g. RevenueSplitter or Treasury) If set to address(0), funds go to the merchant's Vault.

suspendMerchant(address,string).notice: DAO can suspend merchants for violations
